roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/X:NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO DETAIL IS FILED,/X:ORDER SEALING EXHIBITS IN SUPPPORT OF NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO DETAIN WITHOUT BAIL IS SIGNED AND FILED,/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORINGBY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED AFTER A COORDINATED PICK-UP WITHSFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS IS IN PLACE,/CTORD:DEFENDANT REMAINS CONFINED WITHIN INTERIOR PREMISES OF RESIDENT (HOME DETENTION) UNLESS AUTHORIZED BY A SFSO SWORN EMPLOYEE/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/SA1:ANGEL HUNTERHILL/SAORD4:25/SA2:520 S, VAN NESS AVE #257 IN SF/SAORD/SAORD4:10/SAORD/NTW/LDPX:10-14-21/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
